pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_invesalius.sh which downloads 0051.zip and creates the ct_cranium directory.
Verified by checking export_result.sh which explicitly checks this path for STL files.
Verified by checking task.json instructions and export_result.sh which checks for this specific suffix.
Verified by checking export_result.sh which requires st_size > 102400.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on an authentic InVesalius DICOM sample for a CT Cranium dataset. Code execution verified that the DICOM metadata tag (0010,0020) Patient ID is '4055947867'. To pass the verifier, the agent must export an STL file larger than 102400 bytes (100KB) whose name contains this ID and ends with '_Skull.stl' (e.g., '4055947867_Skull.stl') to the '/home/ga/Documents' directory.
